response.justification: While the candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise through GISCollective and demonstrates ability to build high-performance systems at Dunnhumby, critical technical gaps exist. C++ experience is limited to 6 months in 2014-2015; the last 5+ years focus on TypeScript/JavaScript; and there's no Rust background. A senior IC role managing critical routing pipelines requires deep, current systems programming expertise that this candidate lacks.
strengths: Geospatial platform expertise from GISCollective open-source project and Green Map web GIS work
Track record building high-performance, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests at Dunnhumby
Strong engineering fundamentals demonstrated through TDD practice, open-source contributions, and cross-platform development
concerns: C++ expertise is minimal and severely outdated (6 months in 2014-2015); no recent systems programming experience
Tech stack divergence: last 5+ years exclusively in TypeScript/Node.js; role requires C++/Rust and systems-level programming
No navigation or routing systems background; geospatial work is tangentially relevant but not navigation-specific
